hero_subtitle: SFTY delivers a unified compliance cost and workload dashboard for executives to monitor risk, audit readiness, and operational efficiency across digital asset compliance workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Compliance operations generate dispersed workload and cost data that remain difficult for leadership to consolidate and understand in real time. This limits executives’ ability to gauge operational risk, resource allocation and audit readiness across complex digital asset compliance activities.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies dispersed compliance data, workloads and costs into a single dashboard, enabling executives to monitor operational risk, resource allocation and audit readiness across all compliance workflows with clarity.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to executive risk insight
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates and structures provider data into actionable cases, decisions and evidence to provide executives clear compliance workload and risk visibility.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides executives a unified compliance view that connects workload, risk, decisions and evidence beyond fragmented dashboards and isolated tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASPs with a scalable compliance layer that connects provider outputs, preserves audit-ready evidence and supports enterprise-grade deployment and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help executives monitor compliance cost and risk
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Show how compliance workload data informs executive dashboards
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Explain how audit evidence supports risk control reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects provider data for leadership visibility
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY gives executives a connected view of compliance risks, workload, and cost across digital asset operations to improve decision-making and control at the leadership level.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY provide compliance workload visibility?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates provider outputs and team activities into dashboards showing compliance workload, case progress, and operational cost indicators for effective executive oversight.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, provider results and evidence packages enabling audit-ready, traceable compliance records across review and reporting workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: SFTY connects above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without replacing them, structuring their outputs into a cohesive compliance workflow layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace compliance or risk providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows without replacing underlying compliance or risk service vendors.
final_title: Gain executive visibility into compliance operations
final_description: Review how SFTY connects workload, risk and audit-ready evidence into a connected compliance cost dashboard for VASP leadership.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
